title: $abs
text: $abs Return the absolute value of a numeric value. $abs ( X ) Example: vResult = $abs(vNum - 100) Parameters X —numeric value. Return Values Absolute value of X . If an error occurs, $procerror contains a negative value that identifies the exact error. Use Allowed in all component types. Example: Using $abs The following example returns the absolute value of the given expression: vResult = $abs(vNumber - 100) Copy If the value of vNumber is 25, the value stored in vResult is 75.
